fault_hypothesis: Lines 67-68 contain a spurious post-processing step that incorrectly removes the last element when both inputs share the same last value, causing the merged result to be missing one occurrence of that value.

constraints.intent: After line 67, the merged list length must still equal the sum of both input lengths before any pop.
After executing the pop branch, the merged list should still have the correct total length.
At each loop iteration end, the merged list length must equal the number of elements consumed from both sequences.
The returned merged list must contain exactly len(left)+len(right) elements.
